params.name: Enigma Machine
params.description:
On Dec 17, 1932, the first advanced encryption machine designed to protect highly confidential secrets was created. 

The Enigma Machine contains an advanced rotor-structured encryption system that has a rotor. When using the Enigma to press the same letter on the keyboard, the machine will scramble the letters to produce a ciphertext that is very hard to read. During WWII, this cipher device was mainly used by Germany. Poland successfully deciphered the ciphertext and transformed it to readable …
